articles.title: FDA Approves Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 Pill
articles.description: Eli Lilly’s once-daily Foundayo is the second obesity pill to receive FDA approval. It will compete with Novo Nordisk’s pill version of Wegovy.

articles.title: 6,000 Meters Under the Pacific, Japan Seeks Independence From China on Rare Earths
articles.description: Tokyo is succeeding where the rest of the world has failed, reducing its reliance on Beijing for crucial rare earth elements—thanks to an enormous underwater deposit discovered on a remote island.

articles.description: The Middle East supplies a huge amount of the world’s fertilizer. Conflict in the region has sent prices soaring ahead of the critical spring planting season.

articles.title: A New Google-Funded Data Center Will Be Powered by a Massive Gas Plant
